title: aleuritia pusilla
side_effects: Aleuritia pusilla can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and dizziness. In severe cases, prolonged consumption can lead to liver damage, kidney failure, and even respiratory problems. Additionally, using Aleuritia pusilla without proper guidance can cause allergic reactions, skin irritation, and gastrointestinal issues like diarrhea and stomach pain. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for any health benefits.
